name: Cozy Bus Co
entity_status: active (per BBB/Manta listings; SDAT status not directly verified)
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (Cozy Bus Company DBA Braga Transportation, Inc.); Manta; SAFER
notes: Cozy Bus Co operates as DBA of Braga Transportation Inc out of Fall River, MA (also Mattapoisett). USDOT 4034710 shows INACTIVE in SAFER as of fetch on 2026-06; an older Braga USDOT 3298265 is also inactive. Power units (11) and driver count (16) sourced from third-party carrier database (Bubba.ai) before USDOT inactivation. Founders Robert and Melissa Braga; business started 1986-06-10 per BBB profile. State of MA corporation lookup not directly retrieved due to fetch limits; operational status presumed active under MA DPU regulation but FMCSA shows inactive USDOT. Treat with caution: company may have transitioned to a new entity or be operating intrastate-only.

name: A & R Bus Svc LLC
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'A & R BUS' or 'A AND R BUS' searches. No Maryland SDAT or business registry hit located via web search for 'A & R Bus Svc LLC' at 14023 Cantor Ct, Queen Anne, MD 21657 (Talbot County, not Queen Anne's County). Address verified as residential per Redfin/Ownerly. Bubba.ai's top Queen Anne MD carriers list (57 carriers) did not surface this name on first page. Likely a very small intrastate-only school bus operator (no USDOT required for intrastate passenger ops in MD if not crossing state lines). Direct Maryland Business Express search (egov.maryland.gov/businessexpress/entitysearch) is required for definitive SDAT D-number; could not be queried programmatically via WebFetch.

Wood School Bus Service, Inc.' incorporated 2009-08-11 at 39136 Alvie Ln (registry lists Alvie Ln; input file shows Avie Ln — likely typo), Mechanicsville, MD 20659, in good standing. Mary C. Wood is registered agent. No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'WOOD SCHOOL BUS' (MD) — SAFER hits for 'JOSEPH WOOD' (USDOT 1395075, Molena GA) and 'JOSEPH M WOOD' (USDOT 2679734, Vallejo CA) are different individuals. Operator likely intrastate-only school bus contractor for St. Mary's County Public Schools, not requiring a USDOT number. Fleet size not publicly disclosed.

name: Valley Park School Bus Inc
registry_source: None located via web search; MS SOS (corp.sos.ms.gov) direct search required
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found via name search for 'VALLEY PARK SCHOOL BUS' in MS. SAFER returns 'VALLEY PARK TRANSPORTATION LLC' (USDOT 2958295) but state/city not confirmed to match Rolling Fork, MS. Bubba.ai Rolling Fork MS carriers (64 total) lists no carrier matching this name on first page; closest match is South Delta School District itself (USDOT 3336280, 24 power units, 19 drivers, INACTIVE). Valley Park is an unincorporated community in Issaquena County served by South Delta School District (based in Rolling Fork). Mississippi SOS business search (corp.sos.ms.gov) not directly fetchable via WebFetch and no cached hits located for 'Valley Park School Bus Inc'. Likely intrastate-only small school bus contractor; may operate without USDOT number under MS intrastate exemption.

name: Queen City Transportation
carrier_operation: Interstate (Authorized For Hire, Passenger; Private Passenger Business)
inc_date: 2014-07-01 (current LLC; predecessor Klug Bus Service founded 1957)
entity_status: active (per BBB, UMA member directory; OH SOS direct verification not retrieved)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 3519953); BBB Business Profile; School Transportation News press release re: Klug Bus -> Queen City Transportation transition
notes: Legal name 'QUEEN CITY CHARTER LLC' DBA 'QUEEN CITY TRANSPORTATION'. USDOT 3519953 / MC-1168001. 19 power units, 30 drivers, MCS-150 dated 2025-10-14. Safety rating: Satisfactory (last review 2023-10-14). Operating status: ACTIVE. Note: FMCSA address (211 Township Ave) differs from input file address (1053 Ebenezer Rd) — Ebenezer Rd may be a secondary terminal or older address; current SAFER record uses Township Ave. Predecessor business Klug Bus Service founded 1957 in Cincinnati; Aaron Haid purchased and rebranded to Queen City Transportation effective 2014-07-01. Ohio Secretary of State entity record for 'Queen City Charter LLC' not directly fetched but entity is operationally active.
